0.content:
## GOOGLE GEMINI CLI MONITORING
Monitors token usage, operation latency, tool activity, and session data from [Gemini CLI](https://github.com/google-gemini/gemini-cli) sessions using its built-in OpenTelemetry support — no code changes required.

Enable telemetry by configuring `~/.gemini/settings.json` and setting `OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_HEADERS` before running `gemini`.

For full setup instructions, see the [GitHub example](https://github.com/dynatrace-oss/dynatrace-ai-agent-instrumentation-examples/tree/main/ai-coding-agents/gemini-cli).

kpi-total-tokens.title: Total Tokens
kpi-total-tokens.query:
timeseries tokens = sum(`gen_ai.client.token.usage`), filter: {`gen_ai.system` == "google_gemini"}
| fieldsAdd Tokens = arraySum(tokens)

kpi-total-sessions.title: Total Sessions
kpi-total-sessions.query:
fetch logs
| filter service.name == "gemini-cli"
| summarize TotalSessions = countDistinct(`session.id`)

kpi-total-users.title: Total Users
kpi-total-users.query:
fetch logs
| filter service.name == "gemini-cli"
| summarize TotalUsers = countDistinct(`user.email`)

kpi-avg-duration.title: Avg Operation Duration (s)
kpi-avg-duration.query:
timeseries dur = avg(`gen_ai.client.operation.duration`), filter: {`gen_ai.system` == "google_gemini"}
| fieldsAdd AvgDuration = arrayAvg(dur)

chart-tokens-by-model.title: Token Usage by Model

chart-tokens-by-type.title: Token Usage by Type (Input vs Output)
chart-tokens-by-type.query:
timeseries tokens = sum(`gen_ai.client.token.usage`), by: {`gen_ai.token.type`}, filter: {`gen_ai.system` == "google_gemini"}
| summarize totalTokens = sum(arraySum(tokens)), by: {`gen_ai.token.type`}

chart-duration-by-model.title: Avg Operation Duration by Model (s)

table-token-breakdown.title: Token Breakdown by Model

chart-api-latency.title: API Latency Over Time (ms)
chart-api-latency.query:
fetch logs
| filter `service.name` == "gemini-cli" and `event.name` == "api_request"
| makeTimeseries avg_duration = avg(toLong(duration_ms))

kpi-avg-tokens-per-request.title: Avg Tokens per Request
kpi-avg-tokens-per-request.query:
fetch logs
| filter `service.name` == "gemini-cli" and `event.name` == "api_request"
| fieldsAdd total_tokens = toLong(input_tokens) + toLong(output_tokens)
| summarize AvgTokensPerRequest = avg(total_tokens)

chart-most-used-tools.title: Most Used Tools
chart-most-used-tools.query:
fetch logs
| filter service.name == "gemini-cli" and `event.name` == "tool_call"
| summarize count = count(), by: {tool_name}
| sort count desc

chart-avg-tool-duration.title: Avg Tool Duration (ms)
chart-avg-tool-duration.query:
fetch logs
| filter service.name == "gemini-cli" and `event.name` == "tool_call"
| summarize avg_duration = avg(toLong(duration_ms)), by: {tool_name}
| sort avg_duration desc

pie-tool-success.title: Tool Success Rate
pie-tool-success.query:
fetch logs
| filter service.name == "gemini-cli" and `event.name` == "tool_call"
| fieldsAdd result = if(success == "true", then:"Success", else:"Failure")
| summarize count = count(), by: {result}

chart-tokens-by-user.title: Tokens by User

chart-sessions-by-user.title: Sessions by User
chart-sessions-by-user.query:
fetch logs
| filter service.name == "gemini-cli"
| summarize sessions = countDistinct(`session.id`), by: {`user.email`}
| sort sessions desc

header-event-stream.content:
## EVENT STREAM

**Note:** Prompt content is redacted by default. Set `logPrompts: true` in `~/.gemini/settings.json` to include prompt content in log events.

table-live-event-feed.title: Live Event Feed
table-live-event-feed.query:
fetch logs
| filter service.name == "gemini-cli"
| fields timestamp, `event.name`, `gen_ai.request.model`, tool_name, toLong(duration_ms), `session.id`, `user.email`
| sort timestamp desc
| limit 50

chart-event-volume-by-type.title: Event Volume by Type
